steps.title: Find the key context clue
steps.content: The parenthetical explicitly names Adobe Flash as "discontinued in 2021." The blank describes software of that kind — software that is no longer in operation.

steps.title: Match the target meaning
steps.content: The needed word means "no longer functioning or in use." "Defunct" carries exactly that sense.

steps.title: Per-choice elimination
steps.content:
• Choice A — defunct: means no longer existing or functioning, which fits "discontinued in 2021." ✓
  • Choice B — arcane: means obscure or mysterious; discontinuation is about ceasing to function, not obscurity. ✗
  • Choice C — ubiquitous: means found everywhere; the opposite direction — the software is now unavailable. ✗
  • Choice D — extraneous: means irrelevant or unnecessary; the software is necessary to view the art, just no longer available. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
